title: oenothera gayophytum f. densifolia
intro: Oenothera gayophytum f. densifolia, also known as the California evening primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family, characterized by its dense foliage and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oenothera gayophytum f. densifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and can also be used in capsule or powder form to harness its medicinal properties.
